name: RootSystem
purpose: # PRD: Simple Task Management Application ## Introduction The purpose of this product is to allow individuals to manage personal tasks. Users can create tasks, assign them to categories, set due dates, and mark them as complete. The application should sync tasks across multiple devices when a user is signed in. ## Goals - Provide a simple interface for adding, editing, and deleting tasks. - Allow tasks to be categorized and filtered by status, category, or due date. - Enable user authentication so tasks are stored securely and synced. - Deliver responsive design for desktop and mobile.

children.name: UserAuthenticationManager
children.purpose: Handle user sign-in, sign-up, and authentication state to enable secure task storage and sync across devices.
child_interaction_flow: Receives credentials, outputs auth status to TaskDataCoordinator and UI components
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the authentication requirement for secure syncing.

children.name: UserCredentialManager
children.purpose: Handle user sign-in and sign-up operations, including credential validation and creation.
child_interaction_flow: Receives user credentials or sign-up requests, processes them, outputs authentication result and user ID.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers sign-in and sign-up functionality by managing user credentials and account creation.

children.name: CredentialValidator
children.purpose: Validate user credentials (e.g., email/password) for sign-in, checking format, existence, and correctness.
child_interaction_flow: Receives credentials from parent, validates, returns result to parent.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the credential validation aspect of sign-in operations.

children.name: UserCreator
children.purpose: Create new user accounts during sign-up, including storing credentials and user details.
child_interaction_flow: Receives new user data from parent, creates account, returns result to parent.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the user creation aspect of sign-up operations.

children.name: OperationRouter
children.purpose: Route incoming requests to either sign-in or sign-up processing based on operation type.
child_interaction_flow: Receives operation type and data from parent, routes to CredentialValidator or UserCreator, passes results back to parent.
children.coverage_explanation: Explicitly coordinates the sign-in and sign-up operations without hidden components.

children.name: ResponseFormatter
children.purpose: Format the results from sign-in or sign-up into a consistent external response.
child_interaction_flow: Receives results from CredentialValidator and UserCreator via parent, formats into final response for parent output.
children.coverage_explanation: Ensures the parent's external interface is preserved by producing a single formatted output.

children.name: SessionStateCoordinator
children.purpose: Manage authentication state and session lifecycle across user interactions.
child_interaction_flow: Receives authentication result and user ID, manages session state, outputs session token and auth state.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers authentication state management by coordinating session information based on authentication results.

children.name: SessionManager
children.purpose: Handle session creation, validation, and termination based on authentication credentials and user activity.
child_interaction_flow: Receives authentication token to create session, monitors user activity to update session, outputs session status and expiry.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers session lifecycle aspects of authentication state management.

children.name: AuthStateTracker
children.purpose: Maintain and update the current authentication state (e.g., logged in, logged out, expired) based on session status and user actions.
child_interaction_flow: Receives session status and expiry to determine state, processes logout requests, outputs current state and change events.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers authentication state tracking and lifecycle event generation.

children.name: UserInteractionHandler
children.purpose: Process user interactions related to authentication (e.g., login attempts, logout clicks) and forward relevant events to other components.

in_scope: Handling user input for authentication actions
Generating events for session and state management

child_interaction_flow: Receives user interactions, converts them into events for SessionManager and AuthStateTracker.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers user interaction processing as part of authentication state management across interactions.

children.name: CredentialVerifier
children.purpose: Validate user credentials (e.g., username/password) and issue authentication tokens upon successful verification.
child_interaction_flow: Receives token requests and credentials, validates them, outputs tokens or failure results.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the credential verification aspect necessary for authentication state initiation.

children.name: TaskStorageAuthenticator
children.purpose: Secure task storage operations by validating authentication state before allowing access.

in_scope: Validate session tokens for task operations

child_interaction_flow: Receives session token and task operation requests, validates authorization, outputs authorized task operations.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers secure task storage by linking authentication state to storage access control.

children.name: AuthenticationStateValidator
children.purpose: Validate the current authentication state to ensure the user is properly authenticated before allowing access to task storage operations.
child_interaction_flow: Receives authentication inputs, validates them, and outputs result for coordination.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the authentication validation responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: TaskStorageAccessCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate access to task storage based on authentication validation results, ensuring only authenticated users can perform operations.
child_interaction_flow: Receives validation result and operation request, decides to allow or deny access, and routes accordingly.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the coordination and access control responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: TaskStorageHandler
children.purpose: Perform the actual task storage operations (e.g., create, read, update, delete) when access is granted by the coordinator.
child_interaction_flow: Receives operation request from coordinator, executes storage operation, and returns result.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the task storage operation execution responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: DeviceSyncCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate task synchronization across devices based on authenticated user sessions.
child_interaction_flow: Receives auth state and authorized task operations, coordinates device synchronization, outputs sync status.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers device synchronization by using authentication state to enable secure sync across devices.

children.name: SessionAuthenticationValidator
children.purpose: Validate and authenticate user sessions to ensure only authorized devices can participate in task synchronization.
child_interaction_flow: Receives session token and device ID, validates them, outputs session data or error
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the authentication aspect of the parent block, ensuring secure access.

children.name: TaskStateManager
children.purpose: Manage and maintain the current state of tasks across devices, including updates and conflicts.
child_interaction_flow: Receives validated session data and update requests, processes state changes, outputs updates or conflicts
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the core task state management required for synchronization.

children.name: DeviceSynchronizationCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate synchronization actions across multiple devices based on task states and conflicts.
child_interaction_flow: Receives task updates and conflicts, determines synchronization actions, outputs commands and status
children.coverage_explanation: Explicitly handles the coordination aspect as required, avoiding hidden components.

children.name: SynchronizationOutputHandler
children.purpose: Format and prepare synchronization outputs for external use, ensuring proper interface presentation.
child_interaction_flow: Receives commands and status, formats them into final outputs for external systems
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the output preparation to preserve the parent external interface.

children.name: TaskDataCoordinator
children.purpose: Manage task lifecycle (create, edit, delete), handle categorization, due dates, and sync operations with storage.
child_interaction_flow: Receives operations from UI, uses user_id from auth, outputs task data to UI and sync status
children.coverage_explanation: Covers core task management and syncing functionality.

children.name: TaskLifecycleManager
children.purpose: Handle creation, editing, and deletion of tasks, ensuring data integrity and validation.
child_interaction_flow: Receives task operations, processes them, and passes results to StorageSyncCoordinator for persistence.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers create, edit, delete operations as specified in parent description.

children.name: TaskCreationHandler
children.purpose: Create new tasks with validation and data integrity checks
child_interaction_flow: receive task_data_input and user_id
validate inputs
create task record
return created_task or validation_errors
children.coverage_explanation: Covers creation responsibility with validation and data integrity

children.name: TaskEditingHandler
children.purpose: Edit existing tasks with validation and data integrity checks
child_interaction_flow: receive task_id, updated_task_data, and user_id
validate inputs and retrieve task
apply updates with validation
return updated_task or errors
children.coverage_explanation: Covers editing responsibility with validation and data integrity

children.name: TaskDeletionHandler
children.purpose: Delete tasks with data integrity checks

out_of_scope: task archive or soft delete logic

child_interaction_flow: receive task_id and user_id
retrieve task
delete task
return deletion_confirmation or not_found_error
children.coverage_explanation: Covers deletion responsibility with data integrity

children.name: TaskValidationCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate validation rules and data integrity checks across task operations

in_scope: apply validation rules based on operation type

child_interaction_flow: receive task_data and operation_type
apply appropriate validation and integrity checks
return validation_result and integrity_checks
children.coverage_explanation: Explicitly coordinates validation and data integrity as required, avoiding hidden components

children.name: CategorizationHandler
children.purpose: Manage task categorization, including assigning, updating, and validating categories.
child_interaction_flow: Receives task and category data, processes categorization, and passes results to StorageSyncCoordinator.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers categorization responsibility from parent description.

children.name: CategoryAssigner
children.purpose: Assign initial categories to tasks based on input data and rules

in_scope: applying predefined rules to determine category

child_interaction_flow: receives task_data and category_rules, outputs assigned_category to internal interface
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'assigning' responsibility by processing inputs to produce an initial category assignment.

children.name: CategoryUpdater
children.purpose: Update existing task categories based on new information or requests
child_interaction_flow: receives task_id, new_category_data, and update_rules, outputs updated_category to internal interface
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'updating' responsibility by handling changes to task categories.

children.name: CategoryValidator
children.purpose: Validate assigned or updated categories for correctness and compliance
child_interaction_flow: receives category_to_validate and validation_rules, outputs validation_result to internal interface
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'validating' responsibility by ensuring categories meet required standards.

children.name: CategoryCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate between assigner, updater, and validator to manage overall task categorization flow

in_scope: orchestrating assignment, update, and validation steps
out_of_scope: performing assignment, update, or validation logic directly

child_interaction_flow: receives all inputs, calls CategoryAssigner, CategoryUpdater, and CategoryValidator as needed, outputs final_category and validation_summary
children.coverage_explanation: Covers coordination needed to integrate the three functional children, ensuring the parent's external interface is preserved without hidden components.

children.name: DueDateManager
children.purpose: Handle due date operations for tasks, including setting, updating, and validating due dates.

in_scope: integrating due dates with task data

child_interaction_flow: Receives task and due date data, processes due date management, and passes results to StorageSyncCoordinator.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers due date handling responsibility from parent description.

children.name: DueDateSetter
children.purpose: Set initial due dates for tasks based on input parameters, ensuring basic format and validity.

in_scope: storing due date in system format
out_of_scope: checking for conflicts with other tasks

child_interaction_flow: receives task_id and due_date_input, processes to set due_date_set or returns validation_error
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'setting' responsibility by handling initial due date assignment.

children.name: DueDateUpdater
children.purpose: Update existing due dates for tasks, handling modifications and re-validation.
child_interaction_flow: receives task_id and new_due_date_input, updates from current_due_date to updated_due_date or returns update_error
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'updating' responsibility by managing changes to existing due dates.

children.name: DueDateValidator
children.purpose: Validate due dates for correctness, such as format, logical consistency, and time constraints.

in_scope: ensuring due date is not in the past

child_interaction_flow: receives due_date_to_validate, validates against rules, returns validation_result and details
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'validating' responsibility by performing checks on due dates.

children.name: DueDateCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate due date operations by routing requests to appropriate child blocks and aggregating results.

in_scope: determining which child to invoke based on operation_type
out_of_scope: performing actual due date setting, updating, or validation

child_interaction_flow: receives operation_type and inputs, calls DueDateSetter, DueDateUpdater, or DueDateValidator as needed, aggregates outputs to final_due_date or operation_error
children.coverage_explanation: Ensures cohesive interaction among children without introducing hidden components, covering coordination responsibility explicitly.

children.name: StorageSyncCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate sync operations with storage, ensuring data from other children is persisted and synchronized.
child_interaction_flow: Receives inputs from TaskLifecycleManager, CategorizationHandler, and DueDateManager, coordinates sync with storage, and outputs sync status.
children.coverage_explanation: Covers sync operations with storage responsibility from parent description, acting as an explicit coordinator.

children.name: SyncCoordinator
children.purpose: Orchestrate sync operations by receiving sync requests, managing execution order, and coordinating with storage and data providers.

in_scope: receiving sync requests, sequencing operations, calling storage and data handlers
out_of_scope: actual data persistence, data transformation, conflict resolution logic

child_interaction_flow: receives sync_request and data_to_persist, calls StorageHandler and DataProvider, aggregates results into sync_status and persistence_confirmation
children.coverage_explanation: Handles coordination logic for sync operations, ensuring data is passed to storage and status is reported.

children.name: StorageHandler
children.purpose: Handle direct interactions with storage systems to persist and retrieve data as instructed by the coordinator.

in_scope: executing storage operations (e.g., write, read), handling storage errors

child_interaction_flow: receives storage_call from SyncCoordinator, performs storage operation, returns storage_result
children.coverage_explanation: Manages all storage-related tasks, abstracting storage details from the coordinator.

children.name: DataProvider
children.purpose: Supply data from other children or sources for synchronization, ensuring it's formatted and ready for persistence.

in_scope: retrieving data from internal sources, formatting data for storage
out_of_scope: data generation, storage operations, sync coordination

child_interaction_flow: receives data_provider_call from SyncCoordinator, retrieves and formats data, returns provided_data
children.coverage_explanation: Provides the data needed for sync operations, isolating data sourcing from coordination and storage.

children.name: FilterAndViewManager
children.purpose: Provide filtering and sorting of tasks by status, category, or due date for display in the UI.
child_interaction_flow: Receives task list from TaskDataCoordinator and filter criteria from UI, outputs filtered list to UI
children.coverage_explanation: Covers filtering and viewing requirements.

children.name: FilterProcessor
children.purpose: Apply user-selected filters to tasks based on status, category, or due date criteria, returning only matching tasks.
child_interaction_flow: receives task_list and filter_criteria, processes filters, outputs filtered_task_list
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the filtering responsibility of the parent block by applying criteria to select tasks.

children.name: FilterCriteriaParser
children.purpose: Parse and validate user-selected filter criteria for status, category, and due date, converting them into structured filter objects.
child_interaction_flow: Receives user_selected_filter_criteria from parent, outputs parsed_filter_objects to FilterApplicator
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the input parsing and validation responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: TaskRetriever
children.purpose: Retrieve the full set of tasks from storage or upstream source to be filtered.

in_scope: Providing tasks in a consistent format

child_interaction_flow: Outputs full_task_set to FilterApplicator
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the task retrieval responsibility implied by the parent's need to filter tasks.

children.name: FilterApplicator
children.purpose: Apply parsed filter objects to the full task set, evaluating each task against status, category, and due date criteria to produce matching tasks.
child_interaction_flow: Receives parsed_filter_objects from FilterCriteriaParser and full_task_set from TaskRetriever, outputs matching_tasks to parent
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the core filtering responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: SortProcessor
children.purpose: Sort tasks by status, category, or due date according to user preferences, organizing them for display.

in_scope: ordering tasks based on sort keys

child_interaction_flow: receives task_list and sort_preferences, applies sorting, outputs sorted_task_list
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the sorting responsibility of the parent block by arranging tasks as specified.

children.name: PreferenceReader
children.purpose: Read and validate user preferences for sorting (status, category, due date) from the system's configuration or user input.

in_scope: ensuring criteria are valid (e.g., status, category, due date)
handling default preferences if none provided

child_interaction_flow: Receives user_preferences_input, processes it, outputs validated_sort_criteria to TaskSorter
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the responsibility of interpreting user preferences for sorting, which is part of organizing tasks according to user preferences.

children.name: TaskSorter
children.purpose: Sort a list of tasks based on the validated sort criteria (status, category, due date) to organize them for display.

in_scope: applying sorting algorithms (e.g., by status priority, category alphabetically, due date chronologically)
ensuring sorted output is ready for display

child_interaction_flow: Receives task_list_input and validated_sort_criteria from PreferenceReader, sorts tasks, outputs sorted_task_list to DisplayOrganizer
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the core responsibility of sorting tasks by status, category, or due date as specified in the parent block.

children.name: DisplayOrganizer
children.purpose: Organize the sorted task list into a structured format suitable for display, such as grouping or pagination, based on display requirements.

in_scope: formatting sorted tasks for UI presentation (e.g., into lists, groups by category)
applying display-specific organization (e.g., pagination, filtering for view)
out_of_scope: handling user interactions with the display

child_interaction_flow: Receives sorted_task_list from TaskSorter, organizes it for display, outputs organized_display_output as final result
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the responsibility of organizing tasks for display, which is explicitly mentioned in the parent block description.

children.name: DisplayCoordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate filtering and sorting operations to produce a final task list ready for UI display, ensuring proper sequence and integration.

in_scope: combining results into a single output
out_of_scope: performing actual filtering or sorting logic

child_interaction_flow: receives inputs, calls FilterProcessor and SortProcessor in sequence, outputs display_ready_task_list
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the coordination needed to integrate filtering and sorting, preserving the parent's external interface.

children.name: FilterProcessor
children.purpose: Apply filtering criteria to the raw task list to select relevant tasks based on specified conditions.
child_interaction_flow: receives raw_task_list and filter_criteria, outputs filtered_task_list to Sorter
children.coverage_explanation: Handles all filtering responsibilities, ensuring only tasks meeting criteria are passed forward.

children.name: Sorter
children.purpose: Sort the filtered task list according to specified ordering rules to arrange tasks in the desired sequence.
child_interaction_flow: receives filtered_task_list from FilterProcessor and sorting_rules, outputs sorted_task_list to Integrator
children.coverage_explanation: Manages all sorting operations, ensuring tasks are in correct order for final integration.

children.name: Integrator
children.purpose: Coordinate the flow between filtering and sorting, and produce the final integrated task list ready for UI display.
child_interaction_flow: receives sorted_task_list from Sorter, outputs final_task_list to parent
children.coverage_explanation: Explicitly handles coordination and final output generation, covering integration responsibilities.

children.name: UIInterfaceController
children.purpose: Handle user interactions for the responsive interface, translating inputs into operations for other components.

out_of_scope: business logic for tasks or auth

child_interaction_flow: Receives user inputs and data from other children, outputs commands to TaskDataCoordinator, FilterAndViewManager, and UserAuthenticationManager
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the interface for adding, editing, deleting tasks and responsive design.

children.name: Input Capture and Validation
children.purpose: Capture user inputs from the responsive interface, validate them for correctness and format, and forward valid inputs for processing.
child_interaction_flow: Receives user_input_event, validates it, outputs validated_input for processing or validation_error for feedback.
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the initial step of user interaction by ensuring inputs are correct before further operations.

children.name: InputCapture
children.purpose: Capture raw user inputs from the responsive interface and pass them forward for validation.
child_interaction_flow: receives user_input_raw, outputs raw_input_captured to InputValidator
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'capture user inputs from the responsive interface' responsibility by handling raw input acquisition.

children.name: InputValidator
children.purpose: Validate captured inputs for correctness and format, generating validation results.
child_interaction_flow: receives raw_input_captured from InputCapture, outputs validation_result to InputForwarder
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'validate them for correctness and format' responsibility by performing validation checks.

children.name: InputForwarder
children.purpose: Forward valid inputs for processing based on validation results, handling invalid cases appropriately.
child_interaction_flow: receives validation_result from InputValidator, outputs valid_input_forwarded to external processing, outputs invalid_input_notification to interface
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the 'forward valid inputs for processing' responsibility by managing the forwarding of inputs post-validation.

children.name: Operation Translator
children.purpose: Translate validated user inputs into specific operations or commands that other components can execute.
child_interaction_flow: Receives validated_input, translates it into a translated_operation for other components.
children.coverage_explanation: Converts user intentions into actionable operations, bridging the interface and backend components.

children.name: Input Mapping Processor
children.purpose: Map validated user input fields to corresponding operation parameters based on predefined rules
child_interaction_flow: Receives validated inputs, processes mapping, outputs parameters
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the transformation of validated input data into structured parameters ready for operation formulation

children.name: Operation Formulator
children.purpose: Create specific operation or command objects using mapped parameters and operation templates
child_interaction_flow: Receives mapped parameters, formulates operations, outputs specific operations
children.coverage_explanation: Converts parameterized data into executable operation/command specifications

children.name: Operation Router
children.purpose: Direct specific operations to appropriate downstream components based on operation type or target
child_interaction_flow: Receives specific operations, determines routing, outputs routed operations
children.coverage_explanation: Ensures operations reach the correct execution components, completing the translation flow

children.name: Component Coordinator
children.purpose: Coordinate the flow of operations to other components, ensuring they are directed appropriately and managing any sequencing if needed.
child_interaction_flow: Receives translated_operation, determines target component, outputs operation_to_component.
children.coverage_explanation: Explicitly handles coordination to avoid hidden orchestrators, directing operations as per the parent's responsibility.

children.name: OperationRouter
children.purpose: Direct incoming operations to appropriate downstream components based on operation type or metadata.
child_interaction_flow: Receives incoming_operation, determines target, outputs routed_operation to OperationSequencer
children.coverage_explanation: Handles the 'directed appropriately' aspect by routing operations to correct destinations.

children.name: OperationSequencer
children.purpose: Manage sequencing of operations when required, ensuring proper order and dependencies are respected.
child_interaction_flow: Receives routed_operation from OperationRouter, applies sequencing logic, outputs sequenced_operation to OperationDispatcher
children.coverage_explanation: Addresses the 'managing any sequencing if needed' responsibility by ordering operations.

children.name: OperationDispatcher
children.purpose: Send sequenced operations to the appropriate execution components, ensuring they are delivered correctly.
child_interaction_flow: Receives sequenced_operation from OperationSequencer, dispatches to external components, outputs dispatched_operation as final result
children.coverage_explanation: Completes the flow by dispatching operations to other components as coordinated.

children.name: Feedback Handler
children.purpose: Handle feedback from other components or validation errors, translating them into user-appropriate responses for the interface.
child_interaction_flow: Receives validation_error or component_feedback, processes it, outputs user_feedback for the interface.
children.coverage_explanation: Manages the output side of user interactions by providing responses, completing the interaction loop.

children.name: FeedbackReceiver
children.purpose: Receive feedback messages and validation errors from other components and pass them to the translator.

in_scope: Receiving structured feedback from internal components

child_interaction_flow: Receives inputs from other components
Passes raw_feedback to FeedbackTranslator
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the input collection responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: FeedbackTranslator
children.purpose: Translate raw feedback into user-appropriate language and format based on context and user preferences.
child_interaction_flow: Receives raw_feedback from FeedbackReceiver and user_context from internal sources
Passes translated_response to ResponseDispatcher
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the translation responsibility of the parent block.

children.name: ResponseDispatcher
children.purpose: Dispatch the translated response to the appropriate interface component for user presentation.

in_scope: Routing responses to correct output channels

child_interaction_flow: Receives translated_response from FeedbackTranslator
Outputs user_response to external interface
children.coverage_explanation: Covers the output delivery responsibility of the parent block.
